main.description: An outcome claim describing a valuable goal or observed change. Outcomes can stand alone and be linked to activities later.

title.description: A statement of the goal or observed change.

shortDescription.description: Short summary of this outcome claim, suitable for previews and list views. Rich text annotations may be provided via `shortDescriptionFacets`.

shortDescriptionFacets.description: Rich text annotations for `shortDescription` (mentions, URLs, hashtags, etc).

description.description: Optional longer description of this outcome claim, including context or interpretation. Rich text annotations may be provided via `descriptionFacets`.

descriptionFacets.description: Rich text annotations for `description` (mentions, URLs, hashtags, etc).

relatedActivities.description: Optional references to activity claims that may have contributed. Links can be added later as understanding of (causal) relationships develops.

startDate.description: The start date and time when the outcome was observed or is expected.

endDate.description: The end date and time when the outcome was observed or is expected.

locations.description: Optional geographic references related to this outcome. Each referenced record must conform with the app.certified.location lexicon.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this record was originally created.
